comment: v2 — adds escalate_to_human and a USE-WHEN hint on issue_refund.

tools.name: get_ticket
tools.description: Pull the full ticket record. Call this first.

tools.name: lookup_customer_by_email
tools.description: Resolve submitter email to customer_id and basic info.

tools.name: get_billing_history
tools.description: Last 12 months of invoices, payments, plan changes.

tools.name: check_plan_entitlements
tools.description: Plan features and limits for the customer's tier.

tools.name: issue_refund
tools.description: Issue a refund (calls Stripe). USE WHEN you have a verified overcharge with a transaction_id and amount ≤ $10,000. For amounts above $10K or anything requiring contract review, escalate_to_human instead.

tools.name: adjust_invoice
tools.description: Add a credit or correction to an open invoice.

tools.name: check_payment_method
tools.description: Card on file, status, last failure if any.

tools.name: escalate_to_human
tools.description: USE WHEN refund amount exceeds $10,000, OR you cannot identify the txn_id, OR ticket touches contract/legal terms, OR any action you cannot complete with the tools above.
